channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Correctional officers’ union reports increase in violent incidents in Canadian prisons
item.description: A Canadian correctional officers’ union is warning that violent incidents inside federal prisons are becoming more frequent and more severe across the country. The union says correctional staff are in...

item.title: UK Audit Report Says Sizewell C Nuclear Power Could Cost Consumers More Than Hinkley Point
item.description: A report from the United Kingdom’s National Audit Office (NAO) has concluded that electricity generated by the planned Sizewell C nuclear power station in Suffolk is likely to cost consumers more than...

item.title: US Secret Service kills armed suspect after shooting incident near White House
item.description: A serious security incident took place near the White House in Washington DC when an armed man opened fire at a security checkpoint on Saturday evening. According to US Secret Service officials, the s...

item.title: Rise of the ‘gym jihad’ narrative in Hindutva political discourse
item.description: The article examines the emergence of the term “gym jihad” within sections of Hindutva discourse following recent police action in Uttar Pradesh. Authorities in Mirzapur invoked stringent laws, includ...

item.title: Family seeks justice two years after Boksburg restaurant shooting that killed Michaela Yellapan
item.description: Two years after the fatal shooting of 28-year-old Gauteng resident Michaela Moonsamy Yellapan, her family continues to search for justice while the legal process remains ongoing. Yellapan, a financial...

item.title: Police Rescue Newborn and Arrest Three in Akwa Ibom Child Trafficking Case
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Police Command has successfully dismantled a child trafficking syndicate operating within the state, leading to the arrest of three female suspects allegedly involved in the illega...

item.title: Bureau of Immigration confirms no travel records for Senator Bato dela Rosa amid ICC warrant monitoring
item.description: The Bureau of Immigration (BI) has confirmed that there are no recent records of Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa leaving the Philippines through any international ports of entry or exit, amid ongoing ...

item.title: WHO Commends Philippines for Supporting Global Healthcare Workforce Through Training and Capacity Building
item.description: The Department of Health (DOH) announced that the World Health Organization (WHO) has recognized the Philippines for its efforts in strengthening the global healthcare workforce and promoting internat...

item.title: International court affirms legal protection of workers’ right to strike, boosting union powers
item.description: An international legal ruling has confirmed that workers’ right to strike is protected under International Labour Organisation (ILO) conventions on freedom of association, a decision that is expected ...

item.title: Photographer Steven Martin Captured Everyday Life in Miami During 1983
item.description: The article published by Vintage Everyday presents a collection of photographs taken by photographer Steven Martin that document daily life in Miami, Florida, during 1983. The piece focuses on the atm...

item.title: Police launch manhunt after armed robbery at Naledi Pandor’s home
item.description: South African police have launched an intensive manhunt after armed suspects allegedly invaded the home of former Cabinet Minister Dr Naledi Pandor on Friday night. According to national police spokes...

item.title: UK heatwave expected to bring record May temperatures of up to 33C over Bank Holiday weekend
item.description: The UK is experiencing an intense early summer heatwave, with temperatures forecast to reach as high as 33C in parts of southern England and the Midlands during the Bank Holiday weekend. According to ...

item.title: Sandra Mbuvi shares birthday celebration moments with adopted brother Satrine Osinya
item.description: Satrine Osinya, the adopted son of former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko, marked his birthday with warm celebrations from family members who shared emotional tributes online. Satrine, who became part of ...

item.title: Political controversy over PM Modi’s campaign stop for jhalmuri in Jhargram during West Bengal elections
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi drew political attention during his election campaign in West Bengal after he took a short break in Jhargram to enjoy jhalmuri, a popular Bengali puffed rice snack. The Pr...

item.title: Fox Releases First Teaser Trailer for Upcoming ‘Baywatch’ Reboot Series
item.description: Fox has officially unveiled the first teaser trailer for its upcoming reboot of the iconic television series ‘Baywatch,’ giving audiences an early look at the new cast and direction of the franchise. ...

item.title: Prime Minister Nchemba urges unity and warns against divisive influences in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania’s Prime Minister, Dr Mwigulu Nchemba, has called on citizens to remain united and reject what he described as external and internal influences aiming to divide the country. Speaking on Saturd...

item.title: Chicago Fire extend Toronto FC’s winless streak to eight matches with 2-1 victory
item.description: Toronto FC’s difficult stretch continued Saturday night as the club fell 2-1 to the Chicago Fire, extending its winless run to eight matches in Major League Soccer play. Toronto now holds a 3-6-5 reco...

item.title: Shaffy Bello says acting remains her main calling despite success in Nollywood
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Shaffy Bello has explained why she prefers to focus on acting instead of moving into movie production like many people in the entertainment industry. Speaking during an inter...

item.title: Mass Evacuations in Orange County After Chemical Tank Instability at Aerospace Facility
item.description: A rapidly escalating industrial emergency at GKN Aerospace in Garden Grove, California, forced tens of thousands of residents to evacuate as a compromised chemical tank continued to deteriorate. The i...

item.title: Wiebe helps Saskatchewan Roughriders secure comeback victory against Winnipeg Blue Bombers
item.description: The article reports on a Canadian football game in which the Saskatchewan Roughriders staged a comeback victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers, with Wiebe highlighted as the decisive hometown player w...
